description_long: This is a whimsical sandwich placed on a rectangular brown serving board. The sandwich features a lightly toasted, ridged sub roll, split open to reveal an unusual filling of green lettuce, yellow cheese, red tomato slices, and several cartoonish eyeballs and tentacles, giving it a playful and surreal appearance. The bread has a soft, matte finish with visible grill marks on top. The fillings are layered generously, with the eyeballs and tentacles peeking out from between the vegetables and cheese. The serving board is simple and flat, providing a stable base for the sandwich. The overall look is both appetizing and quirky, making it stand out as a novelty food item.
description: A playful sandwich with a toasted sub roll, filled with lettuce, cheese, tomato, and cartoonish eyeballs and tentacles, served on a brown board. Its whimsical fillings make it visually striking and unique.
description_view_0: The sandwich is seen from a slight angle, showing the rounded top of the bread and a glimpse of the fillings inside.
description_view_1: A direct side view reveals the full array of fillings, including the prominent eyeballs and tentacles, along with lettuce and cheese.
description_view_2: The opposite angle to view 0, showing the other end of the sandwich and the layered fillings peeking out.
description_view_3: The back of the sandwich, mostly showing the bread roll with minimal fillings visible.
